EmailTemplate.SubjectTemplate: Application for {Role} | Sumana Das | 12+ YOE in Software Engineering
EmailTemplate.BodyTemplate:
Hi, 

Hope you are doing great.

I am interested in the {Role} role at {Company}. Currently, I am working as a Principal Software Engineer at Accolite with over 12 years of experience architecting high-performance distributed systems and cloud-native frameworks for 10M+ users.

My expertise lies in C#, .NET Core, microservices, cloud services with a strong focus on System Design (HLD/LLD) and Data Structures & Algorithms. I have a proven track record of delivering mission-critical infrastructure with 99.99% reliability with performance optimization and caching technologies like Redis.

I have attached my resume for your review. I would sincerely appreciate your support with a referral for a suitable {Role} opportunity. Please let me know if you need any further information from my side.

Thank you for your time and consideration.



Thanks,
Sumana Das
Contact No. 9748703895
